title: callista marginata
intro: Callista marginata, also known as the fringe shell orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Callista marginata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
